Title: End User Services – Digital Workplace Security Engineer
Description: Embrace the role of a Digital Workplace Security Engineer and play a key role in safeguarding Microsoft 365 environments. You'll investigate incidents, enhance security controls, and drive continuous improvement across identity, endpoint, and email platforms. Collaborate with cross-functional teams and leverage your expertise in security operations to make a real impact.

Title: Alliance Specialist – Cloud Hyperscalers
Description: We are looking for an Alliance Specialist to manage partnerships with leading cloud hyperscalers like AWS, Azure, and GCP. This role involves relationship building, negotiation, and driving cloud adoption strategies. Join us to make a significant impact in the cloud services landscape!

Title: Network Implementation Engineer
Description: Embrace the role of a Network Implementation Engineer and drive the design, integration, and optimization of enterprise network solutions. Leverage your expertise in Cisco, Juniper, and SD-WAN technologies to deliver secure, scalable networks. Collaborate with clients and internal teams to ensure seamless implementations and support business-critical projects. Grow your career with NTT DATA.
